task_description: Fix all TypeScript compilation errors across the entire codebase (frontend and backend) so both builds are clean with zero errors, then add 8 innovative world-class features that make this platform unique: AI Care Plan Writer, Predictive Admission Matching, Real-time Wellbeing Heatmap, Automated Regulatory Reporting, Smart Handover Intelligence, Digital Consent Manager, Resident Digital Twin, and Environmental Intelligence.
